name: pairflow-dev
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm --dir ui install --frozen-lockfile && mkdir -p ~/.pairflow && if [ ! -f ~/.pairflow/config.toml ]; then printf "attach_launcher = \"copy\"\nopen_command = \"echo {{worktree_path}}\"\n" > ~/.pairflow/config.toml; fi'
